name: vast-framework
description: VAST framework — Vision → Architecture → Strategy → Tactics. Skills that operationalize the framework against real docs.

plugins.name: vast-skills
plugins.description: VAST framework skills: validate (single-doc layer purity), transform (prose → VAST shape), connect (parent→child cascade), okr-audit (OKR triad conflation), draft (scaffold a new VAST doc from a seed).
